FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.36sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f378fb7c720>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/17 20:29:26.298977931 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/17 20:29:26.298981497 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299007156 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299007766 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299028478 {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299029079 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299037952 new <- list()

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299048858 new$width <- width
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299049419 if (!missing(height))

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299093926 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299104122 new$version <- version
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299104723 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299117762 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299118283 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299128438 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299128959 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299138398 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299139771 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299153261 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299154002 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299164898 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299165720 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299177578 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299178118 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299200031 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299200662 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299242586 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299243417 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299255956 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299256577 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299268294 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299268865 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299280363 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299280923 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299295005 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299295776 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299305395 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299331810 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299332491 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299350969 "default"))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299351540 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299362006 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299362557 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299373102 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299373733 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299404655 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299405606 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299418937 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299419477 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299430274 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299430865 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299443714 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299444255 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299455912 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299456613 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299479087 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299479628 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299490725 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299491306 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299504526 old$family <- family
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299505076 }

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299562723 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299563475 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299579839 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299580430 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299593430 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299593910 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299604927 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299605438 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299617917 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299618488 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299631327 invisible()

2026/07/17 20:29:26.298977931 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/17 20:29:26.298981497 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299007156 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299007766 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299028478 {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299029079 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299037952 new <- list()
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299038613 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299048858 new$width <- width
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299049419 if (!missing(height))

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299093336 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299093926 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299104122 new$version <- version
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299104723 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299117762 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299118283 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299128438 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299128959 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299138398 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299139771 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299153261 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299154002 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299164898 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299165720 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299177578 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299178118 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299200031 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299200662 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299242586 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299243417 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299255956 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299256577 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299268294 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299268865 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299280363 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299280923 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299295005 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299295776 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299305395 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299331810 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299332491 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299350969 "default"))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299351540 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299362006 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299362557 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299373102 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299373733 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299404655 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299405606 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299418937 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299419477 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299430274 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299430865 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299443714 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299444255 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299455912 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299456613 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299479087 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299479628 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299490725 }
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299491306 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299504526 old$family <- family
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299505076 }

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299528772 "2.0")

2026/07/17 20:29:26.299562723 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299563475 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299579839 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299580430 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299593430 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299593910 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299604927 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299605438 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299617917 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299618488 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/17 20:29:26.299631327 invisible()
